subject: English
title: The Last Leaf – Medium Short Notes

key_points: The story is set in an artists’ colony where Sue and Johnsy live
Johnsy becomes seriously ill with pneumonia
She loses hope and connects her life with the falling ivy leaves
Sue tries to encourage her but fails initially
Behrman secretly paints the last leaf during a storm
Johnsy regains hope when she sees the leaf still there
Behrman dies after catching pneumonia while painting the leaf
characters: Johnsy – Represents despair and later hope
Sue – Symbol of friendship, care, and emotional support
Behrman – Represents sacrifice and the spirit of a true artist
themes: Hope and determination can overcome illness
True friendship involves support and care
Sacrifice is sometimes necessary for the good of others
Art can inspire and change lives
literary_devices: Symbolism – The ivy leaf symbolizes hope and resilience
Foreshadowing – Behrman’s dream of a masterpiece hints at his final act
Irony – His greatest painting is created at the cost of his life
exam_tips: Explain Johnsy’s psychological state during illness
Mention how the last leaf changed her mindset
Discuss Behrman’s role as a hero
Connect the leaf with the theme of hope
